seoTitle: Apollo Bay vs Appin South — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Apollo Bay and Appin South. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Apollo Bay vs Appin South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Apollo Bay and Appin South.
heading: Apollo Bay vs Appin South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Apollo Bay, Victoria and Appin South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Apollo Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Appin South (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Apollo Bay or Appin South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Apollo Bay has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Appin South scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Apollo Bay scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Appin South scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Apollo Bay or Appin South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Apollo Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
